title: The Warden of Greyford
target: remove the Warden of Greyford — the petty tyrant who broke Marek's old company — from the watch-tower he holds with twenty pikemen

contributions.line: Marek keeps his eyes on the tower's guards, ready to strike the moment Veska signals chaos.
Veska quietly slips the taintroot into the cistern, her face unreadable as she watches the soldiers stumble.
Imogen whispers a prayer under her breath, her charm a thin veil over the brewing sickness.

outcomeNarrative: The poison takes hold, and by the late watch, the tower's defenses are in disarray, allowing the mercenaries to slip inside amidst the chaos.
approachLabel: Poison the well, take the tower at dusk
